creator: chris.dukes.aix@gmail.com
text:
When attempting to build fusefs-kmod under poudriere, it fails in the install phase with \
===> Installing rc.d startup script(s)

cat: /usr/ports/sysutils/fusefs-kmod/pkg-message: No such file or directory
*** [post-install] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/sysutils/fusefs-kmod.
===>  Cleaning for fusefs-kmod-0.3.9.p1.20080208_11

Touching that file seems to be sufficient to allow the build to complete.

Fix: 

Add the pkg-message file to the port and/or change the install rule to not need it.
